summary: Iter24 (BUG #1 cache PWA + BUG #2 diagnostic accessible depuis fiche chauffeur) fully validated. Code review confirms all 6 backend-of-code spec items + Playwright validates 10 runtime assertions (10/10 PASS). VersionBadge ('v23.cloche-driver-2026.06.24') is rendered in burger menu of BOTH /driver and /dashboard, right after the logout button, inside a div text-center pt-4 mt-4 border-t border-zinc-800. DriverCardDialog now has the orange '🔍 Diagnostiquer revenus' button next to the email button; clicking it opens DriverEarningsDiagnosticDialog with the driver email pre-filled AND auto-runs the diagnostic (useEffect with 100ms setTimeout → runDiagnoseInline). Diagnostic shows results immediately (Profil #1 found, 0 trips, 0€, 'Diagnostic terminé' toast). Service Worker caches bumped to v17 in /app/frontend/public/sw.js (CACHE_NAME, STATIC_CACHE, DYNAMIC_CACHE, API_CACHE, AUDIO_CACHE) + install log says 'Installing v17 (force update)...'. Non-regression iter22 + iter23: notification-bell cloche still rendered in both Driver & User headers, EnableNotificationsButton mounted at top of burger menu and inside the bell dropdown.

issues: i18n key 'common.myProfile' renders as raw key instead of translated text — pre-existing, NOT caused by iter24, but visible in the menu screenshot. Recommend adding common.myProfile translation in fr/en namespace.
React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' inside AdminDashboard render — pre-existing, unrelated to iter24, but worth fixing for cleaner console.

React/Radix warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' — minor accessibility lint; add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to DriverCardDialog + DriverEarningsDiagnosticDialog.

critical_code_review_comments: VersionBadge.jsx:6 — `export const APP_VERSION = 'v23.cloche-driver-2026.06.24'` ✓ matches spec. Component renders <span data-testid='app-version-badge'> with title attribute ✓.

DriverDashboard.js:17 imports VersionBadge from '@/components/VersionBadge' ✓. Lines 700-702:
placed DIRECTLY after the driver-logout-btn Button at line 695-699 ✓ matches spec exactly.
UserDashboard.js:16 imports VersionBadge ✓. Lines 714-716: same wrapper div + VersionBadge placed right after logout-btn Button at line 705-713 ✓ matches spec exactly.

DriverCardDialog.js:4 imports Search from lucide-react ✓; line 13 imports DriverEarningsDiagnosticDialog ✓; line 27 useState(showDiagnostic) ✓; lines 179-189 render orange button data-testid='driver-diagnose-earnings-btn' DIRECTLY after data-testid='driver-send-email-btn' (line 169-178) ✓; lines 192-197 render <DriverEarningsDiagnosticDialog open={showDiagnostic} onClose={...} token={token} prefilledEmail={card.email||''} /> ✓.

DriverEarningsDiagnosticDialog.jsx:11 accepts prefilledEmail prop ✓; lines 20-27 React.useEffect on [open, prefilledEmail] that calls setEmail+setReport(null)+setTimeout(runDiagnoseInline, 100) when open && prefilledEmail ✓; line 29 runDiagnoseInline accepts overrideEmail param ✓; line 57 runDiagnose preserved as `() => runDiagnoseInline()` ✓; line 77 DialogContent has data-testid='driver-earnings-diagnostic-dialog' ✓.
public/sw.js lines 1-5: all five caches (CACHE_NAME, STATIC_CACHE, DYNAMIC_CACHE, API_CACHE, AUDIO_CACHE) suffixed -v17 ✓; line 35 console.log('[Service Worker] Installing v17 (force update)...') ✓.

Runtime Playwright (Pixel 7 412x915 Driver + User): app-version-badge visible with exact text 'v23.cloche-driver-2026.06.24' ✓. Logout button + notification-bell + EnableNotificationsButton in burger still present (iter22+iter23 non-regression) ✓.

Runtime Playwright (Desktop 1440x900 Admin /admin): drivers-tab clickable, view-driver-{id} button opens DriverCardDialog (data-testid='driver-card-dialog'), driver-diagnose-earnings-btn visible with text '🔍 Diagnostiquer revenus', click opens driver-earnings-diagnostic-dialog with email input pre-filled to 'test-iter22-driver@metro-taxi.com', auto-diagnose runs and renders 'Profil #1: Iter22 Driver' + 0 trips/0€ + 'Diagnostic terminé' toast ✓.
MINOR (pre-existing, NOT iter24 scope): UserDashboard shows raw i18n key 'common.myProfile' in the burger menu instead of translated text — missing translation in fr namespace.
MINOR (pre-existing): React 'unique key prop' warning fires from AdminDashboard render — likely a .map() without key on the drivers table or one of the lists. Worth fixing in a future iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (10/10 Playwright assertions PASSED across Pixel 7 driver, Pixel 7 user, Desktop admin + 6/6 code review items conform)

test_credentials: JWT HS256 signed via JWT_SECRET from /app/backend/.env. (1) Driver test-iter22-driver and User test-iter22-user seeded via /app/backend/tests/_seed_iter22.py; (2) Admin token generated inline for user_id=29612a3d-e68f-4271-881f-39bffce1f715 (contact@metro-taxi.com, role=admin from existing DB record). All seed data cleaned up post-run with --cleanup flag.
seed_data_creation: Reused iter22/iter23 seed (test-iter22-driver + test-iter22-user). Admin token generated from existing contact@metro-taxi.com admin row (no DB write). Driver/user cleanup invoked post-test (verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter24 introduces VersionBadge (data-testid='app-version-badge', constant APP_VERSION = 'v23.cloche-driver-2026.06.24') rendered at the bottom of the burger menu in both /driver (after driver-logout-btn) and /dashboard (after logout-btn). To bump version, edit /app/frontend/src/components/VersionBadge.jsx line 6 + bump SW cache to v18 in /app/frontend/public/sw.js (5 const lines + install log). To open DriverEarningsDiagnosticDialog from a driver's row in admin: navigate /admin → click drivers-tab → click view-driver-{driverId} → click driver-diagnose-earnings-btn (data-testid). The dialog AUTO-runs runDiagnoseInline(prefilledEmail) via React.useEffect on [open, prefilledEmail]; manual Analyser button still works via runDiagnose() wrapper. Both dialogs are nested (DriverEarningsDiagnosticDialog is rendered inside DriverCardDialog component but as a sibling Radix dialog — confirmed no overlay conflict). Admin JWT injection pattern: localStorage.setItem('token', <admin jwt>); localStorage.setItem('adminToken', <admin jwt>); then navigate to /admin (no OTP needed because token is already in localStorage).
rca_of_the_issue: RCA Capitaine's two complaints: (1) After iter22+iter23 he still didn't see the notification bell because his Android browser had cached an old SW (v16) and never received the new bundle. FIX: bumped SW caches v16→v17 so next 'Deploy' triggers a forced cache invalidation. Added VersionBadge in the burger menu so Capitaine can visually confirm at a glance which version is running on his device — if he sees 'v23.cloche-driver-2026.06.24' the fix is live, if he sees nothing or an older string his cache is stale and he needs to redeploy/hard-refresh. (2) On Maaz Tagari's admin fiche he saw 0€/0 trajets because he opened the classic fiche dialog instead of the dedicated Maintenance → Diagnostic page. FIX: added an orange '🔍 Diagnostiquer revenus' button DIRECTLY inside DriverCardDialog that opens the Diagnostic dialog with the driver's email pre-filled AND auto-runs the diagnostic — so from any driver fiche, Capitaine is one click away from the full revenue diagnostic with profile lookup, duplicate detection, calculated vs stored revenues. Validation confirms the auto-run works (toast 'Diagnostic terminé' fires + Profil #1 card displayed immediately upon dialog opening).
